validation_result: FAILED - 15 impressions in 17h (target: 50+ engagement in 24-48h). 70% below pivot threshold. Cause: Low follower count / poor distribution.
decision_needed: Kill (recommended) / Pivot to LinkedIn / Fix Twitter (2-4 weeks)
notes: Validation failed. Product quality is good (templates are high-value) but distribution failed. Twitter account has insufficient reach. 15 impressions = almost no one saw the post.
